title: Visualize Numeric Column Distributions
summary: Chart distributions of numeric fields to spot skew, gaps, and outliers after upload.

content.summary: Chart distributions of numeric fields to spot skew, gaps, and outliers after upload.

body.text: Averages lie when distributions skew. Visualizing numeric columns reveals what means hide. After upload, chart histograms or binned bar charts for amounts, durations, scores. Note long tails that pull averages upward.

body.alt: Person working with spreadsheets and notes
body.caption: Person working with spreadsheets and notes. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: After upload, chart histograms or binned bar charts for amounts, durations, scores. Note long tails that pull averages upward.
Filter extremes temporarily to see central mass—then decide whether outliers are errors or real deals.

items: Log transforms are rarely needed for business bar bins.
Document outlier handling in saved rule notes.

body.text: Use distributions to set threshold filters—amount greater than X—for pipeline reviews.
Talk to Data can summarize percentiles; verify against the chart bins you see.
Distribution charts in Datilio belong in every upload QA pass before executive summaries.

meta_description: Chart distributions of numeric fields to spot skew, gaps, and outliers after upload.
